runners.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 400m at Bulli by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

runners.formComment: Impressive performance to post a big 5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a solid 22.49 over the 400m trip. Smart win and looks a key chance again here.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked shortly after the start.

runners.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (25.35) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Worth including.

runners.formComment: Finished third last time (25.29) over 450m at this track. Awkward draw to overcome. Others preferred.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back at Taree Super Track over 525m in 30.63. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at Taree Super Track at NG five days ago. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (30.36) over 515m at The Gardens. Has a wide draw to navigate and will need the right run to feature.

runners.formComment: Backs up after winning by 3 lengths at Bulli (22.66) beating Fancy Pay Cheque in a Maiden on April 7 six days ago. This is much harder assignment and he needs to find another gear.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room approaching the 1st turn.
Came together and conceded ground on the turn out of the back straight.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 400m. Last start finished 6th in a Grade 4 on April 2 over 324m at Richmond Straight behind Brailey Banner beaten 7 lengths (17.88). Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced tightly on the run to the turn, was galloped on soon after and fell.
